services.name: Custom Furniture Design
services.description: We specialize in crafting custom-made furniture that fits perfectly into your home's unique layout. From bespoke sofas to tailor-made dining tables, our team will work with you to bring your vision to life.
services.fullDescription: Our Custom Furniture Design service offers a complete personalized experience. We begin with a consultation to understand your vision, lifestyle, and space requirements. Our expert craftsmen then create detailed 3D designs for your approval before beginning production. We use premium materials including solid hardwoods, premium veneers, and eco-friendly finishes. Every piece is built to last generations with traditional joinery techniques combined with modern precision. Delivery and installation are included, and we offer a 5-year warranty on all custom pieces.

services.name: Home & Office Furniture
services.description: Explore a wide range of home and office furniture to suit your needs.
services.fullDescription: Our Home & Office Furniture collection covers everything you need to furnish your space beautifully. From living room essentials like sofas, coffee tables, and TV units to bedroom furniture including beds, wardrobes, and dressers. For offices, we offer ergonomic desks, executive chairs, storage units, and complete office setups. All our furniture combines contemporary design with exceptional durability, featuring premium hardware, solid construction, and scratch-resistant surfaces.
features: Living Room: Sofas, coffee tables, TV units

services.name: Interior Design Consultation
services.description: Need help decorating your space? We provide interior design consultations to help you choose the perfect furniture and layout to transform your home or office.
services.fullDescription: Our Interior Design Consultation service connects you with experienced designers who understand both aesthetics and functionality. We offer on-site visits to assess your space, lighting, and flow. Our designers create comprehensive mood boards and 3D visualizations so you can see exactly how your space will look. We help with color palettes, furniture placement, lighting selection, and décor styling. Whether it's a single room or an entire home, we make sure every piece fits perfectly.

services.name: Furniture Repair & Restoration
services.description: We offer furniture repair and restoration services to keep your beloved pieces in excellent condition, whether it's fixing a broken leg or restoring a vintage piece.
services.fullDescription: Our Furniture Repair & Restoration service brings new life to your cherished pieces. From fixing broken legs, drawers, and hinges to complete restoration of antique and vintage furniture. We handle wood polishing, veneer repair, fabric reupholstery, leather conditioning, and structural reinforcement. Our craftsmen use traditional techniques matched with modern materials to ensure repairs are both strong and beautiful. We also offer color matching and refinishing services.

services.name: Free Delivery & Installation
services.description: Our team ensures hassle-free delivery and installation of your furniture, with no additional charges. We take care of everything from setup to cleanup.
services.fullDescription: Our Free Delivery & Installation service covers the entire process from our workshop to your home. We handle safe transportation with specialized packaging and vehicle equipment. Our trained technicians deliver to any floor, including high-rise buildings. We unpack, assemble, and position your furniture exactly where you want it. After installation, we remove all packaging debris, so your space is clean and ready to enjoy. Same-day installation available for most orders.

services.name: Customer Support
services.description: Our dedicated customer support team is available to assist you with any queries, orders, or after-sales service to ensure you're fully satisfied with your experience.
services.fullDescription: Our Customer Support team is here for you at every step. From pre-purchase queries about materials, pricing, and delivery timelines to post-purchase support including warranty claims, replacement parts, and maintenance advice. We offer multiple contact channels including phone, WhatsApp, and email. Our dedicated service coordinators follow up on every order to ensure complete satisfaction. We also provide complimentary follow-up consultations for custom furniture after 30 days.
